zh.lifeSummary: 當Julian Waldron於1566年出生在英國波克夏藍布時，她的父親William Waldron31歲，母親Agnes Dislin19歲。她於1588年與Lawrence John Cheney在英國英格蘭波克夏藍布結婚。他們至少是11個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1643年11月2日在美國麻薩諸塞州素福爾可波斯頓洛波利享年77歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭波克夏藍布。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Julian Waldron于1566年出生在英国波克夏藍布时，她的父亲William Waldron31岁，母亲Agnes Dislin19岁。她于1588年与Lawrence John Cheney在英国英格兰波克夏藍布结婚。他们至少是11个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1643年11月2日在美国马萨诸塞州素福爾可波斯頓洛波利享年77岁，埋葬在英国英格兰波克夏藍布。

nameMeanings.name: Waldron
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (Mayo): from the Norman personal name Waleran, Galeran (ancient Germanic Walahram, Old French Galeran(t)), composed of the ancient Germanic elements walh ‘foreigner’ + hrafn ‘raven’. Compare Walraven . In Ireland, where it is common, this name was Gaelicized early as Mac Bhalronta, also later as Mac Bhaildrin and de Bhaldraithe.
English: habitational name from a place in Sussex named Waldron. The placename derives from Old English wald ‘woodland’ + ærn ‘building’.

History: This is the name of a prominent NH family, established there since the 17th century. Richard Walderne (born c. 1615) came to New England from Alchester, Warwickshire, England, c. 1640 and settled at Dover, NH.

variants.name: Walraven
meanings: German and Dutch: from Walravan, a personal name composed of the elements wal ‘battlefield’ + hraban ‘raven’. The personal name was popular among knights and patricians of the Lower Rhine and Upper Swabian region, where the surname is still common. This surname is also found in England.

variants.name: Walrond
meanings: English (Somerset and Devon): of Normin origin, a variant of   Waldron  .

nameMeanings.name: Julian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the common Late Latin name Julianus, a derivative of Julius . In classical times Julianus was a name borne not only by various minor early saints, but also by the Roman emperor Julian ‘the Apostate’, who attempted to return the Roman Empire from institutionalized Christianity to paganism. For many centuries the English name Julian was borne by women as well as men, for example by the Blessed Julian of Norwich ( c.1342– after 1413 ). The differentiation in form between Julian and Gillian did not develop until the 16th century. Julian is still occasionally used as a girl's name. Notable bearers include the British classical guitarist Julian Bream ( b. 1933 ) and the British jazz pianist and bandleader Julian Joseph ( b. 1966 ).

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Julian Waldron was born in 1566, in Lambourn, Berkshire, England, her father, William Waldron, was 31 and her mother, Agnes Dislin, was 19. She married Lawrence John Cheney in 1588, in Lambourn, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 11 sons and 7 daughters. She died on 2 November 1643, in Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts, United States, at the age of 77, and was buried in Lambourn, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom.

Elle a épousé Lawrence John Cheney en 1588, à Lambourn, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 11 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée le 2 novembre 1643, à Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts, États-Unis, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterrée à Lambourn, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.lifeSummary: Julian Waldron(이)가 1566년 영국 버크실르 램우른에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Waldron(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Dislin(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1588년 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 램우른에서 Lawrence John Cheney(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1643년 11월 2일 미국 매사추세츠 주 수폴크 보스턴 록스버이에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 램우른에 묻혔다.

pt.Fen Ditton, Cambridgeshire, England: Fen Ditton, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Julian Waldron nasceu em 1566, em Lambourn, Berkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Waldron, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Dislin, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Lawrence John Cheney em 1588, em Lambourn, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 11 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 2 de novembro de 1643, em Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América, com 77 anos, e foi sepultada em Lambourn, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Roxbury, Suffolk County, England: роксбури, бостон, суффолк, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Julian Waldron родилась в 1566 г. в местности лэмбурн, биркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени William Waldron было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Agnes Dislin, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lawrence John Cheney в 1588 г. в местности лэмбурн, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 11 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Она умерла 2 ноября 1643 г. в местности роксбури, бостон, суффолк, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 77 лет и была похоронена в местности лэмбурн, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Julian Waldron nació en 1566, en Lambourn, Berkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Waldron, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Agnes Dislin, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Lawrence John Cheney en 1588, en Lambourn, Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 11 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 2 de noviembre de 1643, en Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Masachusets, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 77 años, y fue sepultada en Lambourn, Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
